buildList.buildDescription: A build that focuses on abilities and penetration, reaching 454mm of AP penetration, and being able to Unload 9 Canister shells.

modules.moduleDescription: FASTDRAW MAGAZINES Replaces HESH-T rounds in the secondary magazines with canister rounds. FASTDRAW MAGAZINES Shell Capacity +3

UNLOAD Unload works with Fastdraw magazines in addition to the main cylinder. When activated, it will be applied to the active magazines. Accuracy (after shot) -25%, AP Penetration (Max) +11%, unload Energy Cost +5.6%

OVERCLOCK CORE -10% to equipment cooldown time. Each subsequent critical hit reduces equipment cooldown time by a further 10%. Can stack up to 4 times. Resets when the vehicle is destroyed. FASTDRAW Magazines Energy Cost -6%, Unload Energy Cost -6%, Engine Power -5.7%

OVERDRIVE Taking a critical hit to the fuel tank applies Overdrive for up to IOS and restores 10 Boost Energy. Engine Power +10%, Hull Traverse +5%, Fire Resistance +8.6%, Incoming Crit. Modifier (Engine) +5%, Boost mode regeneration rate -10%

equipments.equipmentDescription: Instantly restores HP and shields. Restores 550 HP instantly. Triggers shield recovery on activation. Taking damage interrupts the repair process. Cooldown: 45s. Charges: 3. Charge cooldown: 15s.
Removes status effects from the vehicle and restores its tracks. Removes all active status effects and resets status buildup. Repairs damaged tracks. Cooldown: 65s.

perks.perkDescription: Rising Tempo increases base reload time by 7.5% instead of 12.5%
+20% to reticle size, including while moving
Reduces minimum lock-on time for a Hydra strike from 1.5s to 1.2s and extends lock-on after stopping targeting from 2.5s to 3.5s
